text: Stepping into this polished, modern space fills me with curiosity. The vivid blue glow beyond the glass is intriguing, hinting at creativity and innovation. There is a sterile order here—the clean lines, bright lights, and clear signage create a sense of safety and purpose. As I move closer to the R+D wall, I feel a spark of anticipation, like I am on the threshold of discovery. Yet, the statement about confusion and perception humbles me, reminding me how fragile clarity can be. I feel both a part of the advancement around me and a humble observer, reminded that knowledge is elusive, always shifting with our focus.
